zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Sully於1263年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根蘇利時，她的父親Raymond de Sully18歲，母親Mrs Raymond Desully15歲。她於大約1300年與William de Braose 2nd Baron Braose在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根高維爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1328年8月23日在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根高維頓享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可布拉波。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes de Sully于1263年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根蘇利时，她的父亲Raymond de Sully18岁，母亲Mrs Raymond Desully15岁。她于大约1300年与William de Braose 2nd Baron Braose在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根高維爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1328年8月23日在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根高維頓享年65岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素可布拉波。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sully
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armelle, Christophe, Geralde, Luce, Pierre, Reynald.
English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from any of the three places called Sully in Calvados (Normandy), Aisne (Picardy), and Loiret (Centre); see 6 below.

English: of Norman origin, perhaps a habitational name from Sully (Glamorgan). However, the placename is manorial in origin, from the Norman surname in 1 above, which is recorded in Glamorgan in the 12th century.

variants.name: Soley
meanings: Catalan: variant of Solell, a topographic name from solell ‘sunny side, southern slope’, from a derivative of sol ‘sun’. Compare Sol 2.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Sully was born in 1263, in Sully, Glamorgan, Wales, her father, Raymond de Sully, was 18 and her mother, Mrs Raymond Desully, was 15. She married William de Braose 2nd Baron Braose about 1300, in Gower, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 23 August 1328, in Gowerton, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in Bramber, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Sully est née en 1263, à Sully, Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Raymond de Sully, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Mrs Raymond Desully, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé William de Braose 2nd Baron Braose environ 1300, à Gower, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 août 1328, à Gowerton, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Bramber, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Sully 1263 in Sully, Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Raymond de Sully 18 und ihre Mutter Mrs Raymond Desully 15. Sie hat um 1300 in Gower, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom William de Braose 2nd Baron Braose geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. August 1328 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Gowerton, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Bramber, Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Sully è nata il nel 1263 nel Sully, Glamorgan, Galles, sua padre, Raymond de Sully, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Mrs Raymond Desully, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato William de Braose 2nd Baron Braose circa 1300, nel Gower, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 23 agosto 1328, nel Gowerton, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Bramber, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Sullyが1263年にウェールズグラモーガンスリーで生まれた時，父Raymond de Sullyは18歳，母Mrs Raymond Desullyは15歳であった。約1300年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンゴウエルでWilliam de Braose 2nd Baron Braoseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1328年8月23日にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンゴウエルトンで65歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススセックスブランバーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Sully(이)가 1263년 웨일스 글램르건 설리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Raymond de Sully(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Raymond Desully(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 대략 1300년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 가워에서 William de Braose 2nd Baron Braose(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1328년 8월 23일 영국 웨일스 글램르건 가워턴에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 브램버에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Sully nasceu em 1263, em Sully, Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Raymond de Sully, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Raymond Desully, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Braose 2nd Baron Braose aproximadamente 1300, em Gower, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de agosto de 1328, em Gowerton, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Bramber, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Sully родилась в 1263 г. в местности сулли, глэморган, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Raymond de Sully было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Raymond Desully, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Braose 2nd Baron Braose около 1300 г. в местности гоуир, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 23 августа 1328 г. в местности гоуиртон, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности брэмбир, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes de Sully nació en 1263, en Sully, Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Raymond de Sully, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Mrs Raymond Desully, tenía 15 años. Se casó con William de Braose 2nd Baron Braose aproximadamente 1300, en Gower, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 23 de agosto de 1328, en Gowerton, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Bramber, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
